findings.message: Page is missing a meta description tag.
findings.recommendation: Add a meta description tag <meta name="description" content="..."> to summarize page content in 150-160 characters.

findings.message: Page is missing a canonical link element.
findings.recommendation: Add a <link rel="canonical" href="..."> element to prevent duplicate content indexing issues.

findings.message: Page is missing Schema.org structured data (JSON-LD).
findings.recommendation: Implement structured data (e.g. Article, Product, Organization, BreadcrumbList) in JSON-LD format to qualify for rich search results.

findings.message: Site robots.txt file was not found or unreachable.
findings.recommendation: Create a robots.txt file at the root of your host (e.g., https://yourdomain.com/robots.txt) to direct search engine crawl behavior.

findings.message: Site sitemap.xml file was not found or unreachable.
findings.recommendation: Generate an XML sitemap and place it at the root of your host. Reference its URL in robots.txt so crawlers can discover your pages.

findings.message: Page is missing OpenGraph meta tags.
findings.recommendation: Add OpenGraph tags (og:title, og:description, og:image, og:url) to enhance social sharing and AI crawler visibility.

findings.message: Page is missing Twitter Card meta tags.
findings.recommendation: Add Twitter Card tags (twitter:card, twitter:title, twitter:description, twitter:image) to enhance Twitter sharing.

findings.message: Page has thin content.
findings.recommendation: Add more unique, valuable content to the page to improve its quality and relevance.

findings.message: Page has no outbound internal links.
findings.recommendation: Add relevant internal links to other pages on your site to improve navigation and crawlability.

findings.message: Page is missing Cache-Control header.
findings.recommendation: Add a Cache-Control header to optimize caching strategy.

findings.message: Page is missing ETag header.
findings.recommendation: Add an ETag header to enable efficient bandwidth usage with conditional requests.

findings.message: No inline styles found — layout sub-checks score 0, mark UNVERIFIABLE
findings.recommendation: Add inline styles or CSS elements to verify layout responsiveness.

findings.message: No nav element found — nav sub-checks score 0
findings.recommendation: Ensure structural navigation tags (<nav> or navigation classes) are present on mobile devices.

findings.message: No images detected to evaluate
findings.recommendation: Include relevant images on your mobile page to evaluate optimization.

findings.message: No CSS media queries detected on the page structure.
findings.recommendation: Implement CSS media queries (e.g. @media (max-width: 768px)) to adjust layout styles dynamically depending on device screen sizes.
findings.evidence: Zero @media queries or responsive link media tags found in page HTML.

findings.message: Structured schema markup is missing or invalid on mobile.
findings.recommendation: Google indexing is entirely mobile-first. Schema.org structured data (JSON-LD) must be present and syntactically valid on the mobile rendering to appear in mobile search results.

findings.message: Missing canonical URL link element.
findings.recommendation: Add a self-referential <link rel="canonical" href="..."> to prevent duplicate indexing across desktop and mobile URL versions.

findings.message: Lack of semantic content container elements reduces AI crawler extractability.
findings.recommendation: Wrap primary page content in semantic HTML elements such as <main>, <article>, or <section> tags to help AI parsers locate main content.

findings.message: Organization or Person entity is weakly defined in Schema.org metadata.
findings.recommendation: Implement structured metadata (JSON-LD) explicitly defining an Organization, Person, or LocalBusiness entity to help AI search engines build reliable knowledge graphs.
findings.evidence: No primary entity of type Organization, Person, Corporation, or LocalBusiness found.

findings.message: Content is too thin for high-quality semantic retrieval (under 300 words).
findings.recommendation: Expand content with contextual depth, examples, definitions, or Q&A structures to improve thematic coverage and semantic query mapping.

findings.message: Page lacks visible author profiles or clearly indicated authorship.
findings.recommendation: Clearly display the author or reviewer of the content, linking to their profile, bio, or credentials to satisfy Search Generative Experience quality standards.
findings.evidence: No rel="author", author class names, or explicit authorship phrases found.

findings.message: Missing organizational trust signals (e.g., about, contact, or policy page links).
findings.recommendation: Incorporate links to dedicated Transparency pages (About Us, Contact Us, Privacy Policy) in the navigation or footer to support site authority.
findings.evidence: No links or clear text mentions of brand transparency pages found.

findings.message: Page is missing Content-Security-Policy (CSP) header.
findings.recommendation: Add a CSP header to mitigate XSS and other code injection attacks.

findings.message: Page is missing X-Frame-Options header.
findings.recommendation: Add an X-Frame-Options header to prevent clickjacking attacks.

findings.message: Page is missing Referrer-Policy header.
findings.recommendation: Add a Referrer-Policy header to control what referrer information is sent with requests.

findings.message: Page is missing HTTP Strict Transport Security (HSTS) header.
findings.recommendation: Add the Strict-Transport-Security header to force clients to use HTTPS.

findings.message: Page is missing X-Content-Type-Options header.
findings.recommendation: Add `X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff` to prevent MIME sniffing attacks.

findings.message: Page is missing Permissions-Policy header.
findings.recommendation: Add `Permissions-Policy` header to control browser feature access (camera, microphone, geolocation, etc.).

findings.message: Page is missing Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy (COOP) header.
findings.recommendation: Add `Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy: same-origin` to isolate your execution context.

findings.message: Page is missing Cross-Origin-Embedder-Policy (COEP) header.
findings.recommendation: Add `Cross-Origin-Embedder-Policy: require-corp` to prevent loading resources without explicit permission.

findings.message: Page is missing Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy (CORP) header.
findings.recommendation: Add `Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy: same-origin` or `same-site` to control which origins can load your resources.
